RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the limiting window.

RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the limiting window resets.

X-Request-Id.description: Server-generated request identifier. A supplied request value is retained only as bounded client correlation metadata.

info.description: Disabled-by-default private beta. Test and live project creation require separate server flags. EarthDaily and Valley are readiness-only; Valley physical writes are disabled.
info.title: AGRO-AI Platform API

parameters.description: Optional client correlation identifier. The response X-Request-Id is independently generated by the server.
